name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编码代理提供生产级工程技能，值得关注因其专注于提升AI代理在实际开发中的实用性和效率。

name: msitarzewski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        msitarzewski /

      agency-agents  

    
      A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
summary: 该项目是一个AI代理集合工具，提供多种专业AI代理角色，从前端开发到社区管理，功能全面且各具特色，值得关注因其能一站式满足多样化AI辅助需求。

name: LMCache
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        LMCache /

      LMCache  

    
      LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer
summary: LMCache是一个用于加速大型语言模型（LLM）的最快速键值缓存层，通过优化缓存机制显著提升模型推理效率，值得关注因其能大幅降低延迟并提高吞吐量。

name: mattermost
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mattermost /

      mattermost  

    
      Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..
summary: Mattermost 是一个开源的协作平台，专注于为软件开发全生命周期提供安全高效的团队沟通与协作解决方案，值得关注因其强大的自托管能力和对数据隐私的保护。

name: container
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        apple /

      container  

    
      A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
summary: 该项目是一个用于在Mac上通过轻量级虚拟机创建和运行Linux容器的工具，采用Swift编写并针对Apple芯片优化。

name: PowerToys
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      PowerToys  

    
      Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
summary: PowerToys是微软推出的Windows实用工具集，能显著提升生产力和系统自定义能力，值得关注。

name: music-assistant
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        music-assistant /

      server  

    
      Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.
summary: Music Assistant 是一个开源媒体库管理器，可连接多种流媒体服务和智能音箱，核心服务器需运行在常开设备上，方便集中管理音乐资源。

name: tolaria
description:
Star

      tolaria  

    
      Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases
summary: Tolaria 是一款用于管理 Markdown 知识库的桌面应用，适合需要高效组织和编辑知识内容的用户。
